{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000842116F21E66C52963CE207"}"},"total":19},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611357746196120344","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的精灵文都非常好看，希望能快点更新ψ(｀∇´)ψ"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772161782,"group_id":"7594091506672077849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7l4ZFGn4NfxSc33LGXlro4HWl9wmaLSCu61Og4bNpZs","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c8b28d04ee474620b99a3f108f5da8ab~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883428&x-signature=k8sfy4gW%2FO3zI8tygPW9OAlSQHE%3D","user_id":"1020766479477579","user_name":"宝可梦世界的鸡汤大师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1020766479477579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594091506672077849","book_info":{"abstract":"当个体趋于完美，可以做到什么地步？
多年以后，青川登上世界之巅，给出了这个答案。
他与自己的宝可梦们胜过天王，斗败冠军，乃至与神明对峙而胜。
最终那代表初始与终焉的神明降临在他面前。
电子音在耳边鼓噪。
“野生的阿尔宙斯跳出来了！向你发出了挑战！”
青川只是微笑着，跨过了世界的终极。
是日，他登临绝顶，呼吸天地。
联盟编年史中记载，绝无仅有的强大者在今日诞生了。
自此之后，训练家这条道路的终点有了名字。
…………
青川环顾四周，看着始终陪伴在自己身边的宝可梦们。
他不禁感叹一声：“我的宝可梦如此完美。”
（系统文，无女主，无开局神兽）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obab2db1ddf86e70b56c545f7e2be21be~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"西山默雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7594091506672077849","book_name":"我的宝可梦如此完美","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":859,"name":"宝可梦","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=859&name=宝可梦&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594091616453788185","read_count":"13248","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"135904"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"61","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,宝可梦,系统,穿越,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2obab2db1ddf86e70b56c545f7e2be21be~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466122&x-signature=rlxDBoAtg8jqNQSNlClPJ78i%2FJE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1772841566999566","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"31"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000842116F21E66C52963CE207"}"},"relate_i
